expectations.evidence: 'Humble Object pattern (Meszaros, popularised by Feathers and the GOOS book)' — cites canonical sources

Controller 'contains only mechanical translations... nothing throws in a non-framework context'

expectations.text: Generalizes: applies whenever inheritance forces contract break
